identity.name: RailGourmet
identity.metaphor: The Orient Express meets Tokyo Subway
identity.vision: A fusion of old-world railway luxury (serifs, gold) with modern digital precision (mono fonts, neon accents).

rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3. It adds culinary elegance. Weight: 700 or 900.
rules.body: Manrope is critical for legibility of PNR numbers and Prices. Use tight tracking for headlines, loose for body.
rules.data: Use JetBrains Mono for PNR, Train Numbers, Timestamps, and Prices. It implies 'ticket' and 'precision'.

primary.description: Saffron Blaze - Appetizing, high energy, Indian context.

secondary.description: Midnight Rail - Deep slate/blue for structure and contrast.

accent.description: Antique Gold - For borders, active states, and premium feel.

background.description: Warm Parchment for light mode (not sterile white).

containers.card: rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
containers.glass_panel: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-2xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold tracking-wide shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(230,81,0,0.39)] transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-lg border-2 border-input bg-background px-4 font-mono text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.instruction: Inputs should look like 'ticket fields'. Boxy, clear borders.

cards.menu_item: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-border bg-card transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl
cards.stat_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-gradient-to-br from-card to-card/50 p-6

textures.grain: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay on the main background to reduce digital sterility.
textures.scanlines: Optional: Very subtle scanlines on Admin Dashboard for that 'Control Room' vibe.

motion.page_transitions: Animate opacity and y-axis (framer-motion initial={{opacity:0, y:20}} animate={{opacity:1, y:0}})

icons.instruction: Use Lucide icons for UI elements. For the 'Train' icon, use the 'TrainFront' or 'TrainTrack' icon.

admin_panel.layout: Sidebar navigation + Top Header. Content area uses 'High Density' grid.
features: Use 'Badge' components for status (Pending: Yellow, Approved: Green).
Tables must be dense (p-2) with monospace font for data.
Add a 'Command Center' feel with dark slate backgrounds and neon accents.

vendor_panel.theme: Hybrid (Dark Sidebar, Light Content or Dark Content based on preference)
vendor_panel.focus: Order Management needs to be big and clear.
vendor_panel.layout: Kanban style board for Order Status (Pending -> Preparing -> On Way -> Delivered).

user_app.hero: Search bar must be the 'Hero'. Big, bold inputs for PNR/Train No.
user_app.pnr_input: Split the PNR input into clear, large digits (like an OTP input) or a very large single input field.
user_app.cart: Floating bottom bar for cart summary on mobile.
user_app.tracking: Vertical timeline stepper with animated pulses for current status.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Avoid generic centered layouts; use asymmetry for interest.
Use glassmorphism with backdrop-blur-md for floating elements (navbars, modals).
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Saffron & Slate' theme.
NEVER use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or headers without a blur/scrim.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA standards. Use Slate-900 on Parchment, or Slate-50 on Midnight.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all inputs/buttons.
accessibility.aria: Use proper ARIA labels for icon-only buttons.
